message:
feat(conformance): add btrfs DevItem fixture, btrfs coverage now 100%

Adds conformance fixture for btrfs device items, completing btrfs
structure coverage (62/62 MUST clauses = 100%).

- Add btrfs_devitem.json fixture for 1TB device with 512GB used
- Add validate_btrfs_devitem_fixture() helper to ffs-harness
- Add conformance test verifying devid, size, sector_size, generation
- Update COVERAGE.md: btrfs now at 100%, only ext4 MMP block remains

Overall conformance coverage: 126/128 MUST clauses (98.4%).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -33,23 +33,21 @@
 | BtrfsItem | ✅ | ✅ | 4 | 4 | 100% | via leaf fixtures |
 | BtrfsKey | ✅ | ✅ | 3 | 3 | 100% | via leaf fixtures |
 | BtrfsKeyPtr | ✅ | ✅ | 2 | 2 | 100% | internal node pointers |
-| BtrfsDevItem | ❌ | ❌ | 4 | 0 | 0% | **MISSING** - device tree items |
+| BtrfsDevItem | ✅ | ✅ | 4 | 4 | 100% | 1TB device with 512GB used |
 | BtrfsRootItem | ✅ | ✅ | 5 | 5 | 100% | via roottree_leaf fixture |
 | BtrfsInodeItem | ✅ | ✅ | 6 | 6 | 100% | via fstree_leaf fixture |
 | BtrfsDirItem | ✅ | ✅ | 4 | 4 | 100% | via fstree_leaf fixture |
 | BtrfsExtentData | ✅ | ✅ | 5 | 5 | 100% | via fstree_leaf fixture |
 
-**btrfs Total: 62 MUST clauses, 58 passing = 93.5%**
+**btrfs Total: 62 MUST clauses, 62 passing = 100.0%**
 
 ## Priority Gaps
 
 1. **ext4 MMP Block** - Multi-mount protection (2 MUST clauses)
-2. **btrfs DevItem** - Multi-device support (4 MUST clauses)
 
 ## Next Actions
 
 - [ ] Add ext4_mmp_block.json fixture
-- [ ] Add btrfs_devitem.json fixture
 
 ---

@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+{
+  "description": "btrfs device item (98 bytes) for a 1TB device with 500GB used",
+  "size": 98,
+  "writes": [
+    {"offset":  0, "hex": "0100000000000000", "_comment": "devid = 1"},
+    {"offset":  8, "hex": "0000000000010000", "_comment": "total_bytes = 1TB (0x100_0000_0000 = 1099511627776)"},
+    {"offset": 16, "hex": "0000000080000000", "_comment": "bytes_used = 512GB (0x80_0000_0000 = 549755813888)"},
+    {"offset": 24, "hex": "00100000", "_comment": "io_align = 4096"},
+    {"offset": 28, "hex": "00100000", "_comment": "io_width = 4096"},
+    {"offset": 32, "hex": "00100000", "_comment": "sector_size = 4096"},
+    {"offset": 36, "hex": "0000000000000000", "_comment": "dev_type = 0 (regular)"},
+    {"offset": 44, "hex": "6400000000000000", "_comment": "generation = 100"},
+    {"offset": 52, "hex": "0000100000000000", "_comment": "start_offset = 1MiB (0x100000)"},
+    {"offset": 60, "hex": "00000000", "_comment": "dev_group = 0"},
+    {"offset": 64, "hex": "00", "_comment": "seek_speed = 0"},
+    {"offset": 65, "hex": "00", "_comment": "bandwidth = 0"},
+    {"offset": 66, "hex": "0102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f10", "_comment": "uuid = 01020304-0506-0708-090a-0b0c0d0e0f10"},
+    {"offset": 82, "hex": "a1a2a3a4a5a6a7a8a9aaabacadaeafb0", "_comment": "fsid = a1a2a3a4-a5a6-a7a8-a9aa-abacadaeafb0"}
+  ]
+}
